response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack proficiency in Python-adjacent languages (TypeScript, Node.js), and clear ownership mindset through open-source and operational projects — but his resume contains significant red flags including an implausible current Google role starting in 2025 and inconsistent employment overlaps, undermining credibility despite otherwise compelling technical depth.
strengths: Proven experience in high-throughput, distributed systems at Meta and Google (claimed)
Strong full-stack fluency in TypeScript, Node.js, and Python-adjacent ecosystems
Active open-source contributions and operational ownership of production systems
concerns: Current Google role listed as starting in April 2025 — impossible given current date
Overlapping employment dates (e.g., Meta until Feb 2025, Google starting Apr 2025, Founder role since 2016)
Lack of explicit Python or AI-agent system design details despite role requirements
